“ parental responsibility ” has the meaning given in —

(a)

F89 ...

(b)

Article 1(2) of the 1996 Hague Convention in relation to proceedings under that Convention; F90 ...


F90 ...


(2) In rules 12.59 to 12.70, references to the court of another F91 ... Contracting State include F92 ...authorities of Contracting States which have jurisdiction to take measures directed to the protection of the person or property of the child within the meaning of the 1996 Hague Convention.
